[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 100000101 3
2 011100011 5
3 101001001 4
4 001101111 6
5 111110100 6
6 001100010 3
7 000010000 1

56 65 000000000 a
67 76 000010000 1 match 7
70 07 000000111 3
